cases.title: Soft Lockup: CPU#23 stuck for 22s in schedule() on ARM64 128-core system
cases.content:
## Problem Description

系统出现 soft lockup，CPU#23 stuck for 22s。问题发生在高并发网络包处理场景。

## Environment
- OS: openEuler 22.03
- Kernel: 5.10.0-60.43.0
- Architecture: ARM64
- CPU: 128 cores

## Analysis

### Crash Tool Analysis
```
crash> bt -c 23
PID: 12345  TASK: ffff800012345678  CPU: 23  COMMAND: "nginx"
#0 [ffff80001234a000] schedule at ffff800010123456
#1 [ffff80001234a100] schedule_timeout at ffff800010123567
#2 [ffff80001234a200] wait_for_completion at ffff800010123678
#3 [ffff80001234a300] mutex_lock_slowpath at ffff800010123789
```

### Root Cause

死锁问题：进程 nginx 持有 mutex A，等待 mutex B，而另一进程持有 B 等待 A。

### Solution

1. 检查锁顺序是否一致
2. 使用 lockdep 检测锁依赖
3. 添加 CONFIG_LOCKDEP=y 重新编译内核

### Verification

编译启用 LOCKDEP 的内核，启动后 lockdep 报告：
```
[    1.234] lockdep: Circular locking dependency detected
[    1.235] lockdep: Possible circular locking scenario:
[    1.236] lockdep:   CPU0                CPU1
[    1.237] lockdep:   ----                ----
[    1.238] lockdep:   lock(A);           lock(B);
[    1.239] lockdep:   lock(B);           lock(A);
```

修复锁顺序后问题解决。

cases.title: Hung Task: nfsd blocked for 120s in nfs4_state_manager
cases.content:
## Problem Description

进程 nfsd 处于 D 状态超过 120 秒，阻塞在 nfs4_state_manager。

## Environment
- OS: openEuler 22.03
- Kernel: 5.10.0-60.43.0
- Architecture: x86_64
- CPU: 32 cores

## Analysis

### Dmesg Output
```
[12345.67] INFO: task nfsd:1234 blocked for more than 120 seconds.
[12345.68]       Tainted: P           OE 5.10.0-60.43.0
[12345.69] "echo 0 > /proc/sys/kernel/hung_task_timeout_secs" disables this message.
[12345.70] task:nfsd         state:D stack:    0 pid: 1234 ppid:   1 flags:0x00004000
[12345.71] Call Trace:
[12345.72]  __schedule+0x2a3/0x680
[12345.73]  schedule+0x35/0xa0
[12345.74]  nfs4_state_manager+0x123/0x450 [nfsd]
```

### Root Cause

NFS4 状态管理器在等待客户端响应时超时，但未设置合理的超时时间。

### Solution

1. 增加 NFS4 超时配置
2. 检查网络连接状态
3. 考虑使用 NFS3 替代（如果不需要 NFS4 特性）

配置修改：
```bash
# 增加超时时间
echo 300 > /proc/fs/nfsd/nfsv4gracetime
echo 300 > /proc/fs/nfsd/nfsv4oldgracetime
```

### Verification

修改配置后 hung task 消失，nfsd 正常运行。

cases.title: OOM: java process killed by oom-killer on 16GB memory system
cases.content:
## Problem Description

Java 进程被 oom-killer 杀死，系统内存 16GB，进程内存使用达到上限。

## Environment
- OS: openEuler 22.03
- Kernel: 5.10.0-60.43.0
- Architecture: x86_64
- Memory: 16GB

## Analysis

### Dmesg Output
```
[12345.67] java invoked oom-killer: gfp_mask=0x14000ca(GFP_HIGHUSER_MOVABLE), order=0, oom_score_adj=0
[12345.68] java cpuset=/ mems_allowed=0-1
[12345.69] CPU: 4 PID: 5678 Comm: java Not tainted 5.10.0-60.43.0
[12345.70] Hardware name: Dell PowerEdge R740
[12345.71] Call Trace:
[12345.72]  dump_header+0x4a/0x1f0
[12345.73]  oom_kill_process+0x120/0x130
[12345.74]  out_of_memory+0x2b0/0x300
[12345.75]  __alloc_pages_nodemask+0x123/0x450

Memory cgroup out of memory: Killed process 5678 (java) total-vm:8589934592, anon-rss:4194304, file-rss:0, shmem-rss:0
```

### Root Cause

Java 进程设置了过大的 heap size (-Xmx8G)，但 cgroup 内存限制为 4GB。

### Solution

1. 调整 Java heap size 以适应 cgroup 限制
2. 或增加 cgroup 内存限制
3. 启用 swap 作为缓冲

解决方案：
```bash
# 方案1: 调整 Java 参数
java -Xmx3G -Xms1G -jar app.jar

# 方案2: 增加 cgroup 限制
echo 8G > /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/app/memory.limit_in_bytes
```

### Verification

调整后 java 进程稳定运行，无 OOM。

cases.title: Kernel Panic: BUG_ON(!spin_is_locked(&lock)) in scheduler
cases.content:
## Problem Description

内核 panic，触发 BUG_ON(!spin_is_locked(&rq->lock)) 在 scheduler.c。

## Environment
- OS: openEuler 22.03
- Kernel: 5.10.0-60.43.0
- Architecture: ARM64
- CPU: 64 cores

## Analysis

### Panic Log
```
[12345.67] kernel BUG at kernel/sched/core.c:1234!
[12345.68] Internal error: Oops - BUG: 0 [#1] SMP
[12345.69] CPU: 12 PID: 123 Comm: kworker/12:0 Tainted: P        OE 5.10.0-60.43.0
[12345.70] pstate: 80000005 (Nzcv daif -PAN -UAO)
[12345.71] pc : schedule+0x123/0x450
[12345.72] lr : __schedule+0x234/0x680
[12345.73] sp : ffff80001234a000
[12345.74] Call trace:
[12345.75]  schedule+0x123/0x450
[12345.76]  do_exit+0x45/0x1a0
[12345.77]  do_group_exit+0x23/0x80
```

### Vmcore Analysis

```
crash> bt -c 12
PID: 123  TASK: ffff800012345678  CPU: 12  COMMAND: "kworker/12:0"
#0 [ffff80001234a000] schedule at ffff800010123456
#1 [ffff80001234a100] __schedule at ffff800010123567
#2 [ffff80001234a200] do_exit at ffff800010123678

crash> struct rq.lock ffff800010123456
struct rq.lock = {
  raw_lock = {
    slock = 0  // 锁未被持有！这是 BUG 的原因
  }
}
```

### Root Cause

锁在错误的时间被释放，可能是因为：
1. 锁提前释放
2. 锁顺序错误
3. 竞态条件

### Solution

1. 分析代码路径，找到锁释放的位置
2. 检查是否有 preempt_count 不匹配
3. 禁用 CONFIG_PREEMPT 测试

### Verification

分析后发现是 preempt_count 不匹配导致，修复后问题解决。

cases.title: Hard Lockup: NMI watchdog detected CPU#5 stuck for 10s
cases.content:
## Problem Description

NMI watchdog 检测到 CPU#5 硬锁，持续 10 秒无响应。

## Environment
- OS: openEuler 22.03
- Kernel: 5.10.0-60.43.0
- Architecture: x86_64
- CPU: 16 cores

## Analysis

### Dmesg Output
```
[12345.67] NMI watchdog: BUG: hard lockup - CPU#5 stuck for 10s!
[12345.68] CPU: 5 PID: 1234 Comm: mysqld Tainted: P        OE 5.10.0-60.43.0
[12345.69] Registers:
[12345.70] RIP: 0010:spin_lock_irqsave+0x23/0x30
[12345.71] RSP: 0018:ffffc90001234500 EFLAGS: 00000046
[12345.72] RAX: 0000000000000001 RBX: ffff888012345678 RCX: 0000000000000000
[12345.73] Call Trace:
[12345.74]  spin_lock_irqsave+0x23/0x30
[12345.75]  some_driver_ioctl+0x123/0x450 [some_driver]
```

### Root Cause

驱动 some_driver 在 ioctl 中持有 spinlock 并执行耗时操作（IO 等待），导致硬锁。

### Solution

1. 检查驱动代码，找到持有锁的长时间操作
2. 将耗时操作移到锁外
3. 或使用 mutex 替代 spinlock（如果可以睡眠）

代码修复：
```c
// Before: 错误做法
spin_lock_irqsave(&lock, flags);
do_io_operation();  // 不能在 spinlock 中睡眠！
spin_unlock_irqrestore(&lock, flags);

// After: 正确做法
spin_lock_irqsave(&lock, flags);
data = prepare_data();
spin_unlock_irqrestore(&lock, flags);
do_io_operation(data);  // 在锁外执行
```

### Verification

修复驱动后，hard lockup 消失。

cases.title: Deadlock: ABBA deadlock between inode_lock and i_mutex
cases.content:
## Problem Description

系统出现死锁，两个进程互相等待对方持有的锁。

## Environment
- OS: openEuler 22.03
- Kernel: 5.10.0-60.43.0
- Architecture: ARM64
- CPU: 32 cores

## Analysis

### Lockdep Output
```
[    1.234] lockdep: Circular locking dependency detected
[    1.235] lockdep: Possible circular locking scenario:
[    1.236] lockdep:   CPU0                CPU1
[    1.237] lockdep:   ----                ----
[    1.238] lockdep:   lock(inode_lock);  lock(i_mutex);
[    1.239] lockdep:   lock(i_mutex);     lock(inode_lock);
```

### Vmcore Analysis
```
crash> bt -a | grep -A5 inode_lock
PID: 1234  TASK: ffff800012345678  CPU: 5  COMMAND: "process_a"
#0 [ffff80001234a000] schedule at ffff800010123456
#1 [ffff80001234a100] __mutex_lock_slowpath at ffff800010123567
#2 [ffff80001234a200] mutex_lock at ffff800010123678
#3 [ffff80001234a300] inode_lock at ffff800010123789

PID: 5678  TASK: ffff800012345abc  CPU: 7  COMMAND: "process_b"
#0 [ffff80001234a000] schedule at ffff800010123456
#1 [ffff80001234a100] __mutex_lock_slowpath at ffff800010123567
#2 [ffff80001234a200] mutex_lock at ffff800010123678
#3 [ffff80001234a300] i_mutex at ffff800010123789
```

### Root Cause

两个进程以不同顺序获取 inode_lock 和 i_mutex：
- Process A: inode_lock -> i_mutex
- Process B: i_mutex -> inode_lock

### Solution

1. 统一锁获取顺序
2. 使用 lockdep 验证

代码修复：
```c
// 统一顺序：总是先获取 inode_lock，再获取 i_mutex
void func_a() {
    mutex_lock(&inode_lock);
    mutex_lock(&i_mutex);
    // do work
    mutex_unlock(&i_mutex);
    mutex_unlock(&inode_lock);
}

void func_b() {
    mutex_lock(&inode_lock);  // 修改顺序
    mutex_lock(&i_mutex);
    // do work
    mutex_unlock(&i_mutex);
    mutex_unlock(&inode_lock);
}
```

### Verification

修改后 lockdep 无警告，系统稳定运行。
